summary: This is a brief announcement post where Joel Spolsky introduces a new job board on his site and announces a series of articles called 'The Guerrilla Guide to Hiring.' He links to the first article in the series, 'Finding Great Developers,' and mentions an upcoming speech at Cornell. The post itself contains no substantive argument, serving purely as a pointer to other content.
key_points: Joel launched a job board on joelonsoftware.com
He began a series called 'The Guerrilla Guide to Hiring'
The first installment focuses on finding great developers
key_insight: This is an announcement post linking to Joel's longer article on finding great developers, with no standalone insights of its own.
